hero.description: courts in seconds. The cleanest way to manage your games and keep your team moving.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From search to serve, fast
howItWorks.subtitle: A three-step flow that keeps players and managers in sync.
howItWorks.playerStep1Desc: Browse verified venues across New Zealand and find the perfect court.
howItWorks.playerStep2Desc: Connect with regular players or organize your own recurring games.
howItWorks.playerStep3Desc: Reserve your spot and enjoy hassle-free sports sessions.
howItWorks.managerStep1Desc: Register your venue and showcase your facilities with photos.
howItWorks.managerStep2Desc: Set your court schedules and pricing.
howItWorks.managerStep3Desc: Reach more players and fill your courts efficiently.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Next Game?
cta.description: Join players and court managers across New Zealand discovering the easier way to book and play sports.

landingFooter.tagline: The smarter way to book courts and guarantee games.
